Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest
Video.title: Night Of The Dragons

Video.summary: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.
Video.title: Case X

Video.summary: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.
Video.title: Rich Girl

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of an up-and-coming young tennis champ's stepfather.
Video.title: Love-15

Video.summary: When one of the young men on the basketball team Chris coaches is found murdered, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Crush

Video.summary: The death of another female cop has a deep psychological effect on Rita.
Video.title: Jasmine

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy woman points toward her estranged husband.
Video.title: Irreconcilable Differences

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy Guatemalan businessman takes on serious international implications.
Video.title: Scorpio Lover

Video.summary: Chris poses as a beauty pageant judge to find out who brutally murdered the pageant's most recent queen.
Video.title: The Queen Is Dead

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: An investment advisors murder implicates his wife, a mistress and his personal trainer.
Video.title: Dead Weight

Video.summary: The romance between a devious 17 year old girl and a doctor gets out of hand when she murders his wife.
Video.title: Kid Stuff

Video.summary: A couple finds themselves in big trouble when their bizarre sex games go awry and a man is killed.
Video.title: Night Games

Video.summary: Reno tackles a new profession while trying to flush out the killer of 3 "Repo Men".
Video.title: Repo Raines

Video.summary: Reno attempts to capture a murderer while meeting with a local Real Estate dealer, which results in the real estate dealer's death during a gunfire exchange.
Video.title: Ace In The Hole

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a precarious situation when he becomes the latest target of a bounty hunter known as a "living legend" as well as Bobby's teacher and mentor.
Video.title: Living Legend

Video.summary: Reno finds his patience tested while attempting to protect a wealthy socialite and murder witness.
Video.title: Family Ties

Video.summary: Reno gets a new view of "the road" when a country singer solicits his help after a series of mysterious incidents lead the Renegade to suspect that her life is in danger.
Video.title: Broken On The Wheel Of Love

Image.alt: Broken On The Wheel Of Love
Broken On The Wheel Of Love
Broken On The Wheel Of Love

Video.summary: Reno is late and Cheyenne is seriously injured while trying to apprehend weapons dealer.
Video.title: Split Decision

Video.summary: Reno is offered a tempting but dangerous option when he finds himself being "recruited" by a dying hit man.
Video.title: Hitman
